## Related Issue

Fixes #(issue number)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`npm test`)
- [ ] Types check (`npm run typecheck`)
- [ ] Code is formatted (`npx prettier --write .`)
- [ ] Self-reviewed the changes
- [ ] Updated documentation if needed
